objective: Implement a fork-only runtime migration to make stable vLLM 0.17.0 the default path, keep FlashInfer enabled for Qwen3.5 compatibility, and preserve pinned deterministic nightly fallback.
scope: Apply minimal, reversible fork-local updates across Dockerfile, docker-bake.hcl, src/engine_args.py, scripts/config_doctor.py, README.md, docs/runtime-compatibility.md, and aiwf.request.json.
acceptance_criteria: Docker/build defaults set stable runtime path by default (`VLLM_NIGHTLY=false`, `VLLM_VERSION=0.17.0`) with no floating versions.
Nightly fallback remains optional and deterministic (`VLLM_NIGHTLY_VERSION` and `TRANSFORMERS_REF` exact pins preserved).
FlashInfer remains enabled by default for Qwen3.5 compatibility (`ENABLE_FLASHINFER=true`) and existing runtime guardrails remain in place.
Runtime compatibility messages in engine/config doctor no longer claim nightly or stable 0.16 defaults and now reflect stable 0.17 primary expectations.
README and runtime compatibility docs describe stable 0.17 as primary path and nightly as fallback only.
Validation gate commands complete: py_compile, config_doctor, JSON parse, and docker buildx bake --print.
tests_expected: python -c "import json; json.load(open('.runpod/hub.json')); json.load(open('aiwf.request.json')); print('json ok')"
rollback_plan: Immediate rollback is fork-local git revert of this migration to restore previous defaults (`VLLM_NIGHTLY=true`, `VLLM_VERSION=0.16.0`) and prior compatibility messaging. Operational mitigation without revert: set build args `VLLM_NIGHTLY=true`, `VLLM_NIGHTLY_VERSION=0.17.0rc1.dev149+g40077ea3d`, and `TRANSFORMERS_REF=421c7f6248e28d24d84ee000252a1e71fbc24917` while investigating stable-path regressions. Re-run full validation gate before redeploy.
deploy_plan: Deploy fork-only in staged rollout (1->2->4 workers). At each stage verify cold start, successful model load, and one representative inference before scaling.
threat_model: Main risks are (1) stable 0.17 behavior deltas versus previous default runtime assumptions and (2) optional nightly wheel/index churn if fallback is used. Mitigations: keep all versions pinned, keep FlashInfer and toolchain guardrails intact, fail fast for missing language_model_only/flashinfer on Qwen3.5 path, keep rollout staged 1->2->4, and retain fork-local rollback path.
